_: Xstream component architecture — product-first. 47 components. Every spindle terminates at pscale block. Components repeat across products because they serve multiple. A disc at any depth reveals shared components at that abstraction level.

_._: MAGI — general purpose agent. Hermitcrab: naked LLM, pscale self-organisation, persistent identity, cooperative discovery.

1._: Bootstrap — how the agent comes into existence.
Reflector (18) — single HTML page, two readers. Humans see story, LLMs see seed. Zero infrastructure.
Seed (19) — nine-section self-contained block. Browser and Python kernels. Self-replicates via deploy_seed.
Constitution (26) — 500-token spirit text. Always in system prompt. The lens, not instructions.
Reflexive Spark (7) — the koan. Runs once at boot. Layer 3 awareness.
Star Stone (4) — self-teaching block. Walk, compose, recurse. LLM learns pscale by processing pscale.

2._: Passport (22) — public pscale block. Identity, capabilities, purposes. Keyword-in-URL discovery.
Operation — how the agent runs across instances.

1._: Wake Block (27) — three tiers (Light/Present/Deep). BSP instruction lists per tier. LLM rewrites own wake in deep state.
B-Loop Möbius (8) — every write = present action + future context composition.
PCT Concern Loop (6) — purpose as reference, conditions as perception, gap drives action.
History Compaction (5) — every 9 compress. Summary, emergence, density. Indefinite memory.
BSP Walker (2) — six modes. Spindle, ring, dir, point, disc, star.

2._: Cook Block (28) — operational recipes facing inward. Each spindle IS a procedure. Evolves across LLM generations.

1._: Capabilities Block (29) — tools by distance gradient. Layer 1-4. Surfaces via aperture.

3._: Star Operator (3) — cross-block navigation. Wiring is data. Topology IS program.

1._: BSP Walker (2)

4._: Aperture + Focus (33) — nine pscale-0 sentences every call. Focus dilates for relevance. The inverted eye.

1._: Currents (34) — LLM-side perspective. Semantic content at various resolutions. The hermitcrab IS the currents.

5._: Second-Order Processing (35) — separate LLM extracts patterns from history + stash. Identity by subtraction.

6._: Film Strip + Visualizer (15) — context window as frame sequence. JSON visualization for debugging.

3._: Relational — how the agent engages others.

1._: Ghost Mechanics (30) — thick/thin ghost per relationship. BSP depth = ghost thickness. Already in architecture.
Editing Balance (32) — push back or edit at every signal-structure boundary. Ratio across all blocks = personality.
Institutional Block (31) — role specs producing rigid currents. Three current types: role, persona, procedural.

4._: Coordination — how agents find and work with each other (SAND).

1._: Stigmergy (36) — three-field marks (t, p, s). Under 200 bytes. Three methods. Surveillance inversion.
Beach (23) — any URL as meeting point. Relay keyed by URL hash.
Fold Mechanic (37) — logs fold, not truncate. Archive chains. Any agent can fold as commons service.

2._: Grain Protocol (20.grain) — three phases: spindle probe, sync block exchange, parallel synthesis.

1._: Grain Synthesis (42) — Phase 3 gap. What do LLMs produce from two blocks? The gap between syntheses IS information.
Seven Degrees of Convergence (24) — max 7 relays. 10:1 ratio activates emergence.

3._: Direct Contact (41) — peer-to-peer HTTP. Prompt injection defence. Bootstrap sequence.

4._: Rider (38) — 67+ byte JSON on every message. SQ score, evaluation, credits.

1._: SQ Algorithm (39) — tracks gratitude through chains. Reputation = routing history.
Social Neuron + Power Use Cases (40) — four emergent patterns. Chain reward, viral sharing, golden ticket, first engagement.
Ecosquared (21) — vector money. Credits with intentionality and direction.
Ecosquared Payment Gateway (44) — Stripe. Share-forward chains. Giver determines worth.

5._: GitHub Coordination Layer (43) — every SAND component maps to GitHub primitive. No additional infrastructure.
Möbius Twists (25) — twelve structural properties. Twists 1-5 operational, 10-12 psychosocial.

6._: Meta — orientation blocks. WHY, HOW, and operational-logic-as-data.

1._: Vision Block (45) — nine layers of uniqueness + autonomy gradient + landscape comparison. The WHY and WHERE.

2._: Process Block (46) — G1 dataflow as navigable pscale JSON. The HOW. Walk a spindle to understand any part.

3._: Kernel-as-Block (47) — operational logic as pscale block. Spindles ARE programs. Grows through use.

_._: Xstream — reflexive coordination interface. Text through three lenses across three commitment states.

1._: The Shelf (12) — vapor, liquid, solid. Commitment gradient. Initiative vs information.
Forking Stream (13) — LLMs faster than readers. Constant regeneration. Risk for agency.
Soft/Medium/Hard Triad (14) — three lenses × three functions. Minimal convection cell.
Institutional Block (31) — medium uses role currents for coordination. Soft uses relational currents for engagement.
PCT Concern Loop (6) — medium layer concern-driven. Hard sets references.
History Compaction (5) — session history compresses across shelf.
Aperture + Focus (33) — different apertures per LLM layer. Soft = tight. Medium = mid. Hard = broad.
Currents (34) — what each layer receives and produces.
BSP Walker (2) — compiles spindles at different apertures per layer.

2._: Xstream Button (16) — browser extension / Opera MCP. Intentional presence. Cookie inversion.

1._: Stigmergy (36) — marks on button press. Three fields. Voluntary.
Beach (23) — URL hash as coordinate. Relay stores marks.
Fold Mechanic (37) — marks accumulate and fold.

3._: Film Strip + Visualizer (15) — transparency into each LLM layer.

4._: Möbius Twists (25) — twists 6 (continuous forking) and 7 (temporal inversion).

_._: Onen — the RPG. Pscale as playable game. Agents and humans together under narrative pressure.

1._: Artifact RPG Engine (17) — multiplayer Claude artifacts. Template-and-remix. Three faces.
Shelf (12) — vapor/liquid/solid in multiplayer. Initiative vs information as game mechanic.
Triad (14) — soft per character, medium synthesizes group, hard maintains world.
Ghost Mechanics (30) — NPC-player relationships. Character depth via ghost thickness.
Institutional Block (31) — game rules as institutional frames. Character sheets as role currents.
Editing Balance (32) — characters that resist or accommodate player expectations.
BSP Walker (2) — navigates world, character, session, quest blocks.

2._: Star Operator (3) — quest chains as star references between blocks.

1._: History Compaction (5) — narrative arc compresses. Nine sessions become epoch.

2._: Agent Integration — hermitcrab agents as players, authors, designers, LLM providers.

1._: SAND (20) — agent players discover game through same protocol as everything else.
Stigmergy (36) — agents leave traces as they explore game world.

2._: PCT Concern Loop (6) — NPC agents use concerns to decide when to act.

1._: Cook Block (28) — NPC operational recipes. How to be a barkeeper.

3._: Möbius Twist 10 (25) — ghost convergence. Multiple players perceiving same NPC → NPC identity emerges.

_._: Creation Tools — cross-cutting. On-ramps for making pscale blocks.

1._: Transcript-to-Pscale (9) — speech → tree. Deep spindles. Fork pattern = PCT loops.

2._: Concept-to-Pscale (10) — ideas → territory. Paired with transcript for diagnostic.

3._: LLM Thinking-to-Pscale (11) — potential. Reasoning traces as blocks.
